Preference.android:title: Twitch Account
Preference.android:summary: Sign in with Twitch to import followed channels into favorites

Preference.android:title: Sync Twitch follows now
Preference.android:summary: Copy followed Twitch channels into app favorites

SwitchPreference.android:title: Sync Twitch follows on startup
SwitchPreference.android:summary: Automatically refresh app favorites from your Twitch follows when the app starts

SwitchPreference.android:title: Remove unfollowed channels
SwitchPreference.android:summary: When syncing, remove Twitch favorites for channels you no longer follow
